basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group. Research focuses on natural language processing and machine learning, particularly LLM reasoning, reinforcement learning, and hallucination in vision-language models. Previously graduated from Shanghai Jiao Tong University with B.Eng. degree.

work.name: Research Intern
work.summary: Research internship focusing on natural language processing and machine learning.
highlights: Conducting research on LLM reasoning and reinforcement learning
Working on hallucination mitigation in vision-language models

work.name: Tencent WXG
work.summary: Research internship at Tencent WeChat Work (WXG) working on AI and NLP projects.
highlights: Research on natural language processing and machine learning
Collaborated with senior researchers on cutting-edge AI projects

work.name: Shanghai AI Lab
work.summary: Research internship at Shanghai AI Laboratory focusing on artificial intelligence research.
highlights: Engaged in advanced AI research projects
Collaborated with leading AI researchers in China

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

publications.name: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond
publications.summary: First author paper on synthesizing verifiable reasoning data for logical reasoning in large language models.
publications.authors: Junteng Liu, Yuanxiang Fan, Zhuo Jiang, Han Ding, Yongyi Hu, Chi Zhang, Yiqi Shi, Shitong Weng, Aili Chen, Shiqi Chen, Yunan Huang, Mozhi Zhang, Pengyu Zhao, Junjie Yan, Junxian He

publications.name: On the Perception Bottleneck of VLMs for Chart Understanding
publications.summary: First author paper analyzing perception bottlenecks in vision-language models for chart understanding tasks.
publications.authors: Junteng Liu, Weihao Zeng, Xiwen Zhang, Yijun Wang, Zifei Shan, Junxian He

publications.name: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
publications.summary: First author paper published at EMNLP 2024 on universal truthfulness hyperplane in large language models.
publications.authors: Junteng Liu, Shiqi Chen, Yu Cheng, Junxian He

publications.name: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
publications.summary: Co-authored paper at ICML 2024 on using in-context sharpness as alerts for hallucination mitigation in language models.
publications.authors: Shiqi Chen, Miao Xiong, Junteng Liu, Zhengxuan Wu, Teng Xiao, Siyang Gao, Junxian He

publications.name: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
publications.summary: Co-authored paper at NeurIPS 2023 on C-Eval, a comprehensive Chinese evaluation suite for foundation models.
publications.authors: Yuzhen Huang, Yuzhuo Bai, Zhihao Zhu, Junlei Zhang, Jinghan Zhang, Tangjun Su, Junteng Liu, Chuancheng Lv, Yikai Zhang, Jiayi Lei, Yao Fu, Maosong Sun, Junxian He

publications.name: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
publications.summary: Co-authored paper at NeurIPS 2023 on composing parameter-efficient modules with arithmetic operations.
publications.authors: Jinghan Zhang, Shiqi Chen, Junteng Liu, Junxian He
